emails.subject: Project INGA
emails.body: Guys Spoke with Dave Duran (lead dealmaker) about Project INGA. He is considering purchasing fleet of QFs. Exposure to CA SCE. Need to make sure that we understand the deal model and regulatory bankruptcy assumptions. I've asked John Neslage to get with RAC Underwriting (Chip Schneider) to make sure that we see the economics. Please help John as much as possible. Thanks, Jim

emails.subject: Re: Project INGA
emails.body: Re: Project INGA I have a call into Chip, and we will talk Monday. James D Steffes@ENRON 03/01/2001 06:24 PM
